description.en: Request cancellation through Claude Code print mode.

actions.prompt:
/claude --print --output-format json "$(cat <<'JOAI_PROMPT'
For run ID {{RUN_ID}}, stop work now and return only: cancel_requested.
JOAI_PROMPT
)"
